title: The World Turns on a Clan
description: On pages 13–15, this part follows Unknown person #13, Unknown person #14, Unknown person #15, Gunko, Celestial Dragons as The conflict widens into persecution, bloodline hatred, and the violent forces that shaped Elbaf and the wider world’s history.
scene: The conflict widens into persecution, bloodline hatred, and the violent forces that shaped Elbaf and the wider world’s history.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I ain't sure if the Timin' was good or bad...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...but two years ago, I had a kid.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: To keep 'em totally safe, I sent my family away...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Back to my hometown. Told 'em to...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: "Count on the day clan!"

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I see... so your kin.. your wife and child are back in your hometown.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But why are you revealing your weak spot to me?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: My hometown is...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: God Valley.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Are you saying the government staged this just to lure you in?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Nah. The celestial dragons are gatherin' there, right? They wouldn't want me crashing their party.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: They just made a mistake.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Still... It feels like destiny is pullin' me in.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Draggin' me back...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Takin' shaky was their biggest blunder.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As long as I get my wife and kid to safety, I'll be at peace with whatever happens next.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But it doesn't feel like luck's on my side anymore, Harald.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: LEND ME A HAND!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No way! I'm gonna sink you right here, right now!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Is that so???

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Bring it on!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Don't interfere.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's hard to believe, but every three years...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: You cowardly rat!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The celestial dragons choose an unaffilated nation rich in resources...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...and turn it into a hunting ground, where they slaughter all the natives for sport.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Help us!!! How can this be allowed to happen?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We now present the Grand Prize of this tournament, Beyond all the rare Devil Fruits Up for Grabs!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: The day of the God Valley incident...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: In one of the calm belts of the grand line lies the Isle of Women!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Behold their former express, the most beautiful woman in the world...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Her name is Shakuyaku!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: WooooOW!! She's gorgeous!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: WoaAA H!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: I want her!:)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Since her capture, she's been kept spotless and pristine in every way!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The winner can decide whether to take her as a wife or a slave!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't be stupid. I'm gonna make her my personal property when I win!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She's the very definition of a priceless treasure!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What an amazing prize, summers!!^ You'd better win her for the shepherd family!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: 'Shell be my wife.

dialogue.speaker: Gunko
dialogue.text: Gunko, with you here...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: "Quit Dreaming, Summers.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We might just take home the clan war trophy!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: PLEASE HELP!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My... kids... you have to get them off the island...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Don't let him take them...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: come here, teach. It'll be alright.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: You have to survive!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Every World Noble Knows...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...The Tourney features several super rare rabbits to hunt. This year, we've not only secured a brat from the buccaneer tribe, but for the first time in 800 years, we've also uncovered...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: ...Members of the DAY CLAN!!!

summary: This part advances the A Hunted Bloodline through 53 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
